_meta.description: Per-insurer channel mix (Banca / Brokers / Agents / Corporate Agents / Direct / Others). Drives Distribution Engine.
_meta.notes: Channel mix on the workbook basis: premium share of NL-36/NL-40 Total (A), up-to-period column. Rows are written by ingest-distribution (parser v2, column-aware); the 2026-06-02 v1 rows (policy-count shares mislabelled as premium, one with a wrong period) were removed 2026-06-11.

data.basis_note: Premium share of Total (A), up-to-period column of the IRDAI NL-36/NL-40 business-acquisition form. Direct includes officers/employees + company-website online + direct-others; Others = micro agents + CSC + IMF + POS + MISP + web aggregators + referral + other. Premium metrics (not profit).
